---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click / type '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages, console output, or crash logs.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help illustrate the problem.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| VisTracer version | e.g. 1.0.0 |
| OS / platform | e.g. macOS 14.4, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04 |
| Node.js version (if running from source) | e.g. 22.1.0 |
| GeoLite2 databases present? | Yes / No |

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. target host, network environment, whether the issue is reproducible on a specific platform only).
